required_inputs.name: physical_system_context
required_inputs.description: A non-toy specification of the physical system S and parameters t,x.

required_inputs.name: variable_domain_and_guards
required_inputs.description: Guards sufficient to define the non-toy law without importing the toy affine closure as a physical claim.

required_inputs.name: non_toy_structure_source
required_inputs.description: A physical, geometric, empirical, or independently justified source from which F_physical is derived.

required_inputs.name: derivation_evidence_for_F_physical
required_inputs.description: A derivation of F_physical from the non-toy structure source.

required_inputs.name: relative_time_scale_bridge_proof
required_inputs.description: A proof that RelativeTimeScale_x(S,t,x) equals F_physical(x) under the non-toy hypotheses.

required_inputs.name: toy_physics_boundary_proof
required_inputs.description: A boundary proof separating toy affine bijection closure from empirical or relativistic claims.
